title: polypodium polypodioides var. microlepis
intro: Polypodium polypodioides var. microlepis, also known as the dwarf polypody fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, which makes it useful in traditional medicine for treating infections and wounds. The health benefits of Polypodium polypodioides var. microlepis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even lower blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
